title: AGRICULTURAL KNOWLEDGE: LINKING FARMERS, ADVISORS AND RESEARCHERS TO BOOST INNOVATION
subtitle: Importance of the access to clear information for small farmers
description: A case study of a co-creative living lab approach in southern Romania that developed and tested a simple financial guide to help small-scale vegetable growers complete their annual income and tax declarations. The guide was introduced through training sessions, resulting in 80 out of 100 participating farmers submitting declarations on time and enhancing cooperative professionalism.
